label: Mid-market HVAC service operators — Colorado / Rocky Mountain
shape: Owner-operated, $3M–$15M revenue, 15–60 technicians, commercial maintenance contracts as primary recurring revenue

queries.gap: What are mid-market commercial HVAC operators in Colorado struggling with that their current pricing or staffing model doesn't solve?
queries.competition: What are the dominant regional HVAC service companies in the Denver/Front Range market doing on pricing, hiring, and contract structure?
queries.demand: What are commercial HVAC operators asking about in trade communities around technician retention, maintenance contract pricing, and cash flow?

watch_condition: Technician wage offers in job postings — leading indicator for competitor pricing moves. Watch compensation before watching pricing pages.
calibration_notes: 2025-12-01 — competitor pricing page change detected via Angi. Behavioral prediction overstated (predicted 3–5 client switches; 1 converted, 1 stayed). T2 source accurate on market move; inaccurate on client behavior magnitude. Apply 20% price differential threshold as default switching trigger in maintenance contract domains.

label: HVAC technician labor market — Colorado / national trend
shape: Labor intelligence — tracks technician wage inflation, certification requirements, shop culture signals

queries.gap: What are HVAC technicians saying they want from employers that they are not getting?
queries.competition: What are regional HVAC companies offering technicians in job postings this month — wages, benefits, sign-on bonuses?
queries.demand: What NATE certifications are in highest demand? What career ceiling complaints are technicians voicing?

watch_condition: Wage offers above $32/hr in job postings signal that competitors can afford to raise prices — watch pricing pages 60–90 days after wage compression.
calibration_notes: 2025-10-08 — T1 signal from r/HVAC confirmed: technician wage inflation outpacing maintenance contract price inflation. Gross margin on 3-year contracts averaged 4.3 points lower than 1-year contracts. T1 source led correctly against operator's prior conviction.

label: Commercial real estate facilities management — Denver metro
shape: Facilities managers at mid-market commercial properties — decision authority over HVAC maintenance contract renewals

queries.gap: What are facilities managers at Denver commercial properties saying about HVAC contractor performance and renewal criteria?
queries.competition: Which HVAC contractors are facilities managers recommending in Denver CRE circles?
queries.demand: What does BOMA's annual survey reveal about FM priorities and vendor selection criteria for the coming year?

watch_condition: BOMA facilities manager survey — promoted from WATCH to ACT NOW 2025-12-03. Renewal decision at Anchor Client B expected Q1 2026. FM authority signal unresolved — monitor until confirmed.
calibration_notes: Signal from operator tacit knowledge (T1): pitching ownership without FM relationship produces passive non-recommendation. Structural pattern confirmed by BOMA publications. Specific prediction unresolved until Q1 2026 renewal.
